name.description: Product name as displayed in the store

ecosystem.description: Smart home ecosystems the device works with

protocol.description: Communication protocols supported by the device

battery_quantity.description: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.

battery_life_years.description: Estimated battery life in years (alternative to months)

rechargeable.description: Whether the device has a built-in rechargeable battery.

ip_rating.description: Ingress Protection code, e.g. IP67, IP44

rgb_support.description: Whether the bulb can display colors

accuracy.description: Measurement accuracy in percent or absolute value

power_source.description: Power sources supported by the device

has_night_vision.description: Supports night vision or infrared recording

has_two_way_audio.description: Has microphone and speaker for two-way communication

has_motion_detection.description: Can detect motion and send alerts

has_person_detection.description: Uses AI to distinguish people from general motion

local_storage.description: Supports local video storage (e.g. microSD card)

field_of_view_deg.description: Horizontal field of view in degrees

detection_range_mm.description: Maximum detection range for motion in millimeters (if supported)

recommended_range_mm.description: Recommended range for optimal performance in millimeters

auto_lock.description: Automatically re-locks after a set time

tamper_alert.description: Sends alert if someone tries to tamper with the lock

door_thickness_min_mm.description: Minimum supported door thickness in millimeters

door_thickness_max_mm.description: Maximum supported door thickness in millimeters

has_tamper_detection.description: Triggers if someone tries to remove the device

max_connected_devices.description: Maximum number of child devices the hub can connect

has_local_processing.description: Automations work locally without internet connection

has_ir_blaster.description: Includes an infrared blaster for controlling IR devices

detected_gas.description: Types of gas or hazard the sensor can detect

has_audio_alert.description: Whether the device emits an audible alarm

audio_alert_volume_db.description: Volume of the audible alert in decibels

detects_leaks_above.description: Can detect water dripping from above

detects_leaks_below.description: Can detect water on the floor

min_detected_water_level_mm.description: Minimum detectable water layer thickness in millimeters

probe_type.description: Type of leak detection probe: contact (two metal contacts) or cable (sensing rope)

temp_min_c.description: Minimum measurable temperature in degrees Celsius

temp_max_c.description: Maximum measurable temperature in degrees Celsius

temperature_range.description: Measurable temperature range as an object with min/max

co2_range_min_ppm.description: Minimum measurable CO2 concentration in ppm

co2_range_max_ppm.description: Maximum measurable CO2 concentration in ppm

tank_volume_liters.description: Water tank volume in liters (alternative name)

serviced_area_m2.description: Maximum area the humidifier can effectively cover in square meters
Recommended room area in square meters

hepa_filter.description: Whether the purifier uses a HEPA filter

indoor_unit_length_mm.description: Length of indoor unit in millimeters

recommended_area_m2.description: Recommended room area in square meters

max_load_kw.description: Maximum electrical load in kilowatts (for thermostat)

cable_length_mm.description: Length of heating cable in millimeters (for floor sensor)

cable_length.description: Length of cable in millimeters (alternative name)

room_mapping.description: Supports creating and saving a map of the home

carpet_detection.description: Can detect carpets and adjust cleaning

obstacle_avoidance.description: Can avoid obstacles like cables and shoes

auto_empty_station.description: Comes with or supports an auto-empty dustbin station

voice_assistant_support.description: Supports voice assistant control (Alexa, Google, etc.)

width_mm.description: Physical width of the TV in millimeters

width.description: Physical width of the TV in millimeters (alternative name)

max_width_mm.description: Maximum physical width in millimeters (if adjustable)

water_leak_sensor.description: Detects water leaks, placed under sinks, appliances, near pipes, in the bathroom
water_leak_sensor.title: WaterLeakSensor
water_leak_sensor.schema_description: A smart home water leak detection sensor

property_descriptions.name: User-facing product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Water Leak Sensor T1'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier or SKU as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'SJCGQ12LM'.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path (direct or via hub/bridge) - may be multiple.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.battery_life_months: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ip_rating: Ingress protection rating, e.g. 'IP67'. Indicates water and dust resistance.
property_descriptions.has_audio_alert: Whether the sensor emits an audible alarm when a leak is detected.
property_descriptions.audio_alert_volume_db: Volume of the audible alert in decibels, e.g. 85.
property_descriptions.detects_leaks_above: Whether the sensor can detect water dripping from above via contacts on top.
property_descriptions.detects_leaks_below: Whether the sensor detects water on the floor via bottom contacts.
property_descriptions.min_detected_water_level_mm: For leak detection below the device via bottom contacts - minimum detectable water layer thickness in millimeters, e.g. 0.5.
property_descriptions.probe_type: Type of leak detection probe: contact (metal contacts) or cable (sensing rope).

smart_lamp.description: A smart light bulb or lamp that can be controlled remotely via app or voice
smart_lamp.title: SmartLamp
smart_lamp.schema_description: A smart home light bulb or lamp

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Yeelight Smart Bulb W3'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'YLDP010'.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this bulb works with, through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.socket_type: The socket or base type this bulb fits into. 'integrated' for fixtures where the bulb is not replaceable, e.g. a smart light strip or panel.
property_descriptions.wattage_w: How much power the bulb consumes in watts, e.g. 8.5.
property_descriptions.brightness_lm: Maximum brightness in lumens, e.g. 800. Higher is brighter.
property_descriptions.color_temp_min_k: Warmest color temperature in Kelvin, e.g. 2700. Lower values are more yellow/warm.
property_descriptions.color_temp_max_k: Coolest color temperature in Kelvin, e.g. 6500. Higher values are more white/cool.
property_descriptions.rgb_support: Whether the bulb can display colors, not just white light.
property_descriptions.cri: Color Rendering Index - how accurately the bulb reproduces colors compared to natural light. 80+ is good, 90+ is excellent.
property_descriptions.dimmable: Whether the bulb supports dimming via the app or ecosystem.
property_descriptions.voltage_min_v: Minimum operating voltage in volts, e.g. 220.
property_descriptions.voltage_max_v: Maximum operating voltage in volts, e.g. 240.
property_descriptions.lifespan_hours: Rated lifespan in hours as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 15000.

gas_leak_sensor.description: Detects gas leaks (natural gas, LPG, carbon monoxide), typically installed near gas appliances or on the ceiling
gas_leak_sensor.title: GasLeakSensor
gas_leak_sensor.schema_description: A smart home gas leak detection sensor

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Gas Sensor'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'JTQJ-BF-01LM'.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.detected_gas: Types of gas or hazard this sensor can detect. natural_gas = methane/CH4, lpg = propane/butane.
property_descriptions.has_audio_alert: Whether the sensor emits an audible alarm when gas is detected.
property_descriptions.audio_alert_volume_db: Volume of the audible alert in decibels, e.g. 85.
property_descriptions.power_source: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed

smart_doorbell.description: A smart doorbell with a button and notification capability, optionally with a camera and two-way audio
smart_doorbell.title: SmartDoorbell

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Video Doorbell G4'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.has_camera: Whether the doorbell includes a built-in camera for video.
property_descriptions.resolution: Video resolution if a camera is present.
property_descriptions.has_two_way_audio: Whether the doorbell supports two-way audio communication with the visitor.
property_descriptions.has_night_vision: Whether the camera supports night vision or infrared recording in low light.
property_descriptions.has_motion_detection: Whether the doorbell can detect motion and trigger alerts without the button being pressed.
property_descriptions.power_source: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed
property_descriptions.battery_quantity: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.
property_descriptions.battery_life_months: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ip_rating: Ingress protection rating for outdoor use, e.g. 'IP65'.
property_descriptions.local_storage: Whether the device supports local video storage, e.g. via microSD card.
property_descriptions.cloud_storage: Whether the device supports cloud video storage.
property_descriptions.field_of_view_deg: Horizontal field of view in degrees.

has_camera.description: Whether the doorbell includes a built-in camera for video.

smart_lock.description: A smart door lock that can be controlled remotely, supports keypad, fingerprint, card, or app-based access
smart_lock.title: SmartLock

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Smart Lock U100'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.access_methods: Methods supported for unlocking. keypad = PIN code entry, rfid_card = NFC or RFID card.
property_descriptions.auto_lock: Whether the lock automatically re-locks after a set time.
property_descriptions.tamper_alert: Whether the lock sends an alert if someone tries to tamper with or force it.
property_descriptions.power_source: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed
property_descriptions.battery_life_months: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.
property_descriptions.battery_quantity: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.
property_descriptions.door_thickness_min_mm: Minimum supported door thickness in millimeters.
property_descriptions.door_thickness_max_mm: Maximum supported door thickness in millimeters.
property_descriptions.ip_rating: Ingress protection rating for outdoor use, e.g. 'IP65'.

door_window_sensor.description: A magnetic contact sensor that detects whether a door or window is open or closed
door_window_sensor.title: DoorWindowSensor
door_window_sensor.schema_description: A smart home door and window open/close sensor

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Door and Window Sensor P2'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.battery_quantity: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.
property_descriptions.battery_life_months: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ip_rating: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor installation.

motion_sensor.description: Detects motion or presence in a room, typically using PIR or radar technology
motion_sensor.title: MotionSensor
motion_sensor.schema_description: A smart home motion or presence sensor

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Motion Sensor P1'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.sensor_type: Detection technology. pir = passive infrared, detects movement only. radar/microwave = can detect stationary presence.
property_descriptions.detection_range_mm: Maximum detection range in millimeters, e.g. 7000.
property_descriptions.detection_angle_deg: Horizontal detection angle in degrees, e.g. 100. Indicates the value at the maximum detection range.
property_descriptions.has_light_sensor: Whether the device also includes an ambient light sensor reporting lux values.
property_descriptions.retrigger_interval_s: Minimum interval in seconds between consecutive motion detection events (blind time).
property_descriptions.battery_quantity: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.
property_descriptions.battery_life_months: Expected battery life in months as stated by manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ip_rating: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor installation.

smart_camera.description: An indoor or outdoor smart surveillance camera with remote viewing capability
smart_camera.title: SmartCamera

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Camera Hub G3'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.has_night_vision: Whether the camera supports night vision or infrared recording in low light.
property_descriptions.has_two_way_audio: Whether the camera has a microphone and speaker for two-way communication.
property_descriptions.has_motion_detection: Whether the camera can detect motion and send alerts.
property_descriptions.has_person_detection: Whether the camera uses AI to distinguish people from general motion.
property_descriptions.indoor_outdoor: Whether the camera is designed for indoor use, outdoor use, or both.
property_descriptions.ptz: Whether the camera supports pan, tilt, and zoom (motorized rotation).
property_descriptions.local_storage: Whether the camera supports local video storage, e.g. via microSD card.
property_descriptions.cloud_storage: Whether the camera supports cloud video storage.
property_descriptions.power_source: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed
property_descriptions.battery_life_months: Expected battery life in months if battery-powered.
property_descriptions.ip_rating: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor cameras, e.g. 'IP66'.
property_descriptions.field_of_view_deg: Horizontal field of view in degrees, e.g. 130.
property_descriptions.detection_range_mm: Maximum detection range for motion in millimeters (if supported).
property_descriptions.recommended_range_mm: Recommended range for optimal performance in millimeters.

smart_siren.description: A smart siren or alarm device that emits a loud sound and optionally flashing light as a security deterrent or alert
smart_siren.title: SmartSiren
smart_siren.schema_description: A smart home siren or security alarm

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Siren'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this device can connect to through any connection path.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols supported by this device.
property_descriptions.max_volume_db: Maximum siren volume in decibels, e.g. 110.
property_descriptions.has_strobe_light: Whether the alarm includes a flashing strobe light.
property_descriptions.has_tamper_detection: Whether the alarm triggers if someone tries to remove it from the wall.
property_descriptions.power_source: Power sources supported by this device. ac_dc_adapter means An AC/DC adapter is a power supply that allows the device to run by plugging it into an outlet. battery = disposable batteries, rechargeable_battery = built-in rechargeable battery charged via USB or other means. Multiple values allowed
property_descriptions.battery_quantity: Number of disposable batteries required, e.g. 6 for '6 x AA'. Only relevant if battery is in power_source.
property_descriptions.ip_rating: Ingress protection rating, relevant for outdoor installation.
property_descriptions.indoor_outdoor: Whether the alarm is designed for indoor or outdoor use.

smart_hub.description: A smart home hub or gateway that connects and controls other smart home devices, bridging protocols like Zigbee or Z-Wave to Wi-Fi
smart_hub.title: SmartHub
smart_hub.schema_description: A smart home hub, gateway, or bridge device

property_descriptions.name: Product name as it appears in the listing, e.g. 'Aqara Hub M2'
property_descriptions.model: Model identifier as stated by the manufacturer, e.g. 'HM2-G01'.
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems this hub connects to or bridges into.
property_descriptions.protocol: Wireless protocols this hub supports for connecting child devices, e.g. ['zigbee', 'wifi'] for a hub that bridges Zigbee devices to Wi-Fi.
property_descriptions.max_connected_devices: Maximum number of child devices this hub can connect simultaneously, as stated by manufacturer.
property_descriptions.has_local_processing: Whether automations and device control work locally without internet connection.
property_descriptions.has_ir_blaster: Whether the hub includes an infrared blaster for controlling IR-based devices like TVs and air conditioners.
property_descriptions.wired_connection: Wired connectivity options. ethernet = RJ45 port for wired network connection. usb_host = USB port for connecting USB dongles or devices.
property_descriptions.power_source: Power sources supported. Most hubs are mains or usb powered. ac_dc_adapter = powered via an included AC/DC adapter plugged into a wall socket.
property_descriptions.matter_bridge: Whether this hub acts as a Matter bridge, exposing connected non-Matter devices to Matter-compatible ecosystems like Apple Home or Google Home.
property_descriptions.zigbee_version: Zigbee protocol version supported, if applicable. zigbee_3.0 is backward compatible with 1.2 devices.

property_descriptions.name: Product name as displayed, e.g. 'Aqara Temperature Sensor'
property_descriptions.ecosystem: Smart home ecosystems the device works with
property_descriptions.temperature_range: Measurable temperature range as an object with min/max

humidity_sensor.description: Measures relative humidity, often combined with temperature sensor
humidity_sensor.title: HumiditySensor

property_descriptions.name: Product name

co2_sensor.description: Detects carbon dioxide concentration, typically for air quality monitoring
co2_sensor.title: CO2Sensor

property_descriptions.name: Product name

smart_radiator_actuator.description: Electronically controlled valve for radiators, allows per-room temperature control
smart_radiator_actuator.title: SmartRadiatorActuator

property_descriptions.name: Product name, e.g. 'Aqara Radiator Thermostat E1'

smart_humidifier.description: Smart humidifier that can be controlled remotely and may include humidity sensor
smart_humidifier.title: SmartHumidifier

property_descriptions.name: Product name

air_purifier.description: Smart air purifier with filter and remote control
air_purifier.title: AirPurifier

property_descriptions.name: Product name

air_conditioner.description: Smart air conditioner (window, split, or portable) with remote control and climate management
air_conditioner.title: AirConditioner

property_descriptions.name: Product name
property_descriptions.indoor_unit_length_mm: Length of indoor unit in millimeters

smart_floor_thermostat.description: Thermostat for electric underfloor heating systems, typically wall-mounted
smart_floor_thermostat.title: SmartFloorThermostat

property_descriptions.name: Product name

floor_temperature_sensor.description: Wired or wireless sensor that measures floor temperature, used with floor heating systems
floor_temperature_sensor.title: FloorTemperatureSensor

property_descriptions.name: Product name
property_descriptions.cable_length_mm: Length of sensor cable in millimeters

robot_vacuum.description: Autonomous robotic vacuum cleaner, may include mopping and self-emptying station
robot_vacuum.title: RobotVacuum

property_descriptions.name: Product name
property_descriptions.room_mapping: Ability to create and store maps

smart_tv.description: Smart television with internet connectivity and smart home integration
smart_tv.title: SmartTV

property_descriptions.name: TV model name
property_descriptions.width_mm: Physical width of the TV in millimeters
property_descriptions.width: Physical width of the TV in millimeters (alternative)
property_descriptions.max_width_mm: Maximum physical width in millimeters (if adjustable)

smart_speaker.description: Smart speaker with voice assistant, often used as a hub for music and voice control
smart_speaker.title: SmartSpeaker

property_descriptions.name: Product name

subwoofer.description: Wireless or wired subwoofer for enhanced bass, can be part of a smart audio system
subwoofer.title: Subwoofer
subwoofer.schema_description: A subwoofer for smart home audio

property_descriptions.name: Product name

ceiling_speakers.description: In-ceiling speakers, often passive, can be driven by smart amplifiers
ceiling_speakers.title: CeilingSpeakers

property_descriptions.name: Product name

unknown.description: Device that doesn't fit into any other category.
unknown.title: Unknown
